channel.title: costa-rica on Hart Hoover
channel.description: Recent content in costa-rica on Hart Hoover

item.title: Costa Rica Chispita - Nozy Coffee
item.author: hart.hoover@gmail.com (Hart Hoover)
item.description: Today I’m drinking some Costa Rican coffee by way of Japan. A coworker brought back some coffee from a recent trip to Asia, this coffee among them. Nozy Coffee’s “The Roastery” is apparently supplying beans to several highly regarded Tokyo coffee shops. If you find yourself going to Tokyo, there’s a decent review of Nozy Coffee on Timeout.jp. This particular coffee, the Costa Rica Chispita, was roasted on November 28th so it’s possible the flavor has diminished, but I don’t really taste all the things claimed on the label.
